test_cases.description: Verifies the skill applies the conversion formula (Motivation × Value / Friction × Anxiety) when analyzing a page
test_cases.input: Our landing page has 1.2% conversion rate. What's the framework for improving it?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill implements pricing with psychological anchoring and featured plan
test_cases.input: Create a 3-tier pricing component with a featured middle plan and annual/monthly toggle

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill implements mouse-leave exit intent detection correctly
test_cases.input: Add exit intent detection that shows a popup when a user tries to leave the page
